body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Moves plotting code out of experiments/ and into a Makie extension and an OceananigansMakie extension.


## To-do
- [x] add plotting extension: ClimaCouplerMakieExt
- [x] add Oceananigans + plotting extension: ClimaCouplerOceananigansMakieExt
- [x] move data_sources.jl, test_rmses.jl into src SimOutput module (not ext)
- [x] add stub functions in src (new module Plotting)
- [x] update places these functions are called to use the extension
- [x] move some component model-specific code out of debug plots and into component model files
- [x] add docs
- [x] check plots are correctly generated in buildkite (debug plots, slabplanet conservation, calibration, CMIP ocean diagnostics)


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: add plotting extension

body:
closes [#1629 ](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1629) - This PR makes checkingpointing the atmos cache recreates the views of the parent array on CPU. When the object is a view on GPU, calling `adapt` makes a new array as `adapt` is not aware of the corresponding parent array. To fix this, the view can be recreated again using the parent array if it exists in the cache.

This reduces the atmos cache from an AMIP simulation from 4.6G to 2.1G. The checkpoint of the atmos cache from a CPU simulation and from a GPU cache are now roughly the same size.
title: Recreate views when making a checkpoint of the atmos cache
